title: Cleisostoma bilamellatum
taxonomy: Cleisostoma bilamellatum belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is a species of orchid and is classified within the subfamily Epidendroideae. The genus Cleisostoma is part of the tribe Gastrodieae. Further classification places it within the subtribe Gastrodiinae. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the orchid family.
